column10: EOG is flagged for EXIT with hold=3/10, alpha=LOW, and no research thesis or catalysts to justify retention; proceeds move to cash to reduce portfolio noise.
ABBV is flagged for EXIT with hold=3/10, alpha=LOW, and zero differentiated thesis; exiting frees capital from a low-conviction name.
LIN is flagged for EXIT with hold=3/10, alpha=LOW, and no identifiable near-term catalysts; removing to reduce position count toward target range.
MS carries hold=3/10, alpha=LOW, action=REDUCE with no variant thesis; full exit eliminates redundant financials exposure alongside BAC and JPM.
BAC is hold=3/10, alpha=LOW, action=REDUCE; with MS and JPM also held, the financials sector is over-represented and BAC is the weakest-scored of the three.
MRK is hold=3/10, alpha=LOW, action=REDUCE with no research thesis or catalysts; exiting reduces healthcare dead weight with proceeds held as cash pending higher-conviction opportunities.
